title: Booker/Appointment Booker - Towards development in customer work
salary_range: Takuupalkka toimii turvanasi. Provisioiden ja bonusten ansiosta voit kuitenkin odottaa ensimmäisen kuukauden jälkeen palkkasi olevan noin 2 000 €/kk ja kehityksen kautta 3 000-4 000 €/kk. Lisäksi meillä on jatkuvasti kisoja mm. ulkomaanmatkoista tapahtumista, bonuksista ja lahjakorteista. Palkkakertymän opit laskemaan onnistumisista itse, mutta tarkastelemme sitä viikoittain myös yhdessä.
job_responsibilities: salesperson, telephone and customer service center
jobcontent:
Are you looking for something new as summer approaches? We are looking for sales-inspired people with a strong desire to develop to represent our partner in buukka. We offer high-quality education and continuous coaching so that you can succeed in your work. Buukkaaja's work takes into account the customers' interest and demand so that the work is meaningful. As you develop, you will have the opportunity to advance to the position of sales supervisor.

At work, you book appointments for consumer customers for our partner's service. Our partner has a unique new, easy-to-use concept to offer customers the opportunity to benefit from unused precious metals. With your job well done, you map out high-quality customer encounters and support the business and brand image of the company we represent.

The goals of the work increase according to your learning. The most important thing for us is that you are a person with a good attitude and heart, who has enough enthusiasm and motivation to develop, even up to positions of responsibility. We value customer service/sales background. The basic use of a computer must be natural to you, and we expect you to have fluent Finnish language skills and to quickly learn new things.

Our working days are normally on weekdays from 8:45 to 16, including a 30 min meal break and 3 coffee breaks. Our office is located in Savilahti with good transport connections and close to universities.

The guaranteed salary works for you. However, thanks to commissions and bonuses, you can expect your salary to be around €2,000/month after the first month, and €3,000-4,000/month through development. In addition, we constantly have competitions, e.g. events, bonuses and gift cards for foreign trips. You learn how to calculate the salary accrual from successes yourself, but we also look at it weekly together.

Our team is equipped with good energy and like-mindedness. Openness, flexibility and understanding of others is everyday life at our office. Supervisors are closely involved in everyday life. It is important for us to know our employees so that we can coach and reward each one individually.

"As a result of the survey, 100% of our team believe they can further develop their skills at Dynastia."

We are a Responsible Employer-certified company and we follow these principles in our daily operations. We are also the official partner company of Savonia-amk.

Get to know us and submit your application! https://www.mjdynastia.fi/rekry

We are happy to tell you more about the work: Janiina Kekkonen, 0445264462, janiina.kekkonen@mjdynastia.fi

Check some: https://linktr.ee/mjdynastia

M&J Dynasty is a sales and customer service specialist company founded in 2015. We produce high-quality and long-term customer relationships for our clients. We offer B2B and B2C projects for sales beginners and professionals. We offer you a comprehensive orientation, high-quality training and continuous coaching so that you can succeed in your work.

You can be contacted on weekdays from 8:00 a.m. to 4:00 p.m. If you wish, you can attach your resume to your application via our pages.

title: Full stack software developer (Magnolia)
salary_range: Competitive hourly wage based on Finnish collective agreements.
what_we_expect: · Experience of cooperation in teams (at least 6 months)
· Experience with the SAFe business model (at least 6 months)
· Experience in the Azure DevOps environment (at least 6 months)
· Experience with open source technologies such as
· Java and React (at least 6 months) or · similar technologies (at least 12 months in total)
· Experience with content management systems, especially · Magnolia (at least 6 months)
· Experience with database solutions, especially · SQL Server (at least 4 months)
· Experience in continuous release (CI/CD) (at least 6 months)
· The above-mentioned minimum skills must be from assignments within the last 4 years
what_we_offer: A nice working relationship in a big company. We offer versatile work where every day is different and interesting. We offer a competitive salary that matches your skills.
Were you interested? The position will be filled after finding a suitable person even before the end of the application period, so send us your application quickly!
However, please also include your salary expectations in the application!
Lokki Henkilöstöpalvelut Oy - Your personal personnel consultant at your service
You can also find us on Facebook and Instagram.
jobcontent:
We are looking for 2 full stack software developers for our client's tender. Information about the assignment: We are looking for two software developers to be part of the team to develop and maintain nationwide digital information systems for employment services. The position is part of extensive development entities, where the emphasis is on a modern, scalable and unified digital platform, multi-supplier cooperation, response to legislative changes and information exchange between job seekers, employers and authorities. The work supports digitization of labor services, customer orientation and knowledge-based management on a national scale.

Technical skills requirements:
· Experience of cooperation in teams (at least 6 months)
· Experience with the SAFe business model (at least 6 months)
· Experience in the Azure DevOps environment (at least 6 months)
· Experience with open source technologies such as
· Java and React (at least 6 months) or · similar technologies (at least 12 months in total)
· Experience with content management systems, especially · Magnolia (at least 6 months)
· Experience with database solutions, especially · SQL Server (at least 4 months)
· Experience in continuous release (CI/CD) (at least 6 months)

General requirements:
· The above-mentioned minimum skills must be from assignments within the last 4 years
· Fluency in written and spoken Finnish is required

Features:
· Collaborative team player who is dedicated
· Proactive and passionate about continuous improvement
· Structured, analytical and self-directed approach to work
· Strong communication and information sharing skills
· Ability to demonstrate technical leadership and senior level competence

Selected employees undergo a security check.

If the Mandatory requirements are met and you are interested in this position, add a paragraph at the beginning, which tells you what skills you have in all the technologies or other skills mentioned in the announcement.

Place of work: Hybrid model (Espoo + remote work)
Language requirements: Finnish - fluent written and oral skills
Duration: 1.9.2026 - 1.9.2027
Allocation: 100%

We offer you:
A nice working relationship in a big company. We offer versatile work where every day is different and interesting. We offer a competitive salary that matches your skills.

Were you interested? The position will be filled after finding a suitable person even before the end of the application period, so send us your application quickly!

However, please also include your salary expectations in the application!

For more information about the position, please contact Kimmo Kärsämä, tel. 050 412 7500, kimmo.karsama@lokki.fi

Get to know Lokki through our blog and website: <https://lokki.fi/blogi/>

Lokki Henkilöstöpalvelut Oy - Your personal personnel consultant at your service

We have been operating in the HR sector since 2005 and belong to the Association of HR Companies. Our vision is to offer the best customer experience with our reliable, human-friendly and effortless service all over Finland. Our most important resource is a person, who we know succeeds best in a reliable and encouraging atmosphere. At Lok, you will be supported by our own personnel consultant throughout your employment. At Loki, we believe in partnership, which is achieved as a result of flexible service. Get to know us and our open jobs: <https://www.lokki.fi/> .

You can also find us on Facebook and Instagram.
